# GHTA — Multi-source developer & software trends

GHTA aggregates ranking and growth data across developer/software ecosystems
(GitHub today; App Store, Chrome Web Store, Microsoft Store next), tracks metric
history, and classifies items into an AI-assisted category tree.

## Key pages
- /trending — items filtered by source, language, popularity
- /rising — items ranked by daily/weekly/monthly growth
- /categories — browse by category
- /item/{source}/{externalId} — item detail with metric history

## Data
Each item exposes: source, externalId, name, description, language, category,
primary metric (e.g. GitHub stars), and daily/weekly/monthly growth. Facts such
as "X gained N stars this week" are rendered as plain text for citation.

## API
A public REST API mirrors these pages (see /api/openapi.yaml in the source repo).
